        Reset to the starter world?

        This replaces your current build with the preset village. You'll lose anything you've placed on the home grid.

        Tiny World Builder
        Choose how you'd like to begin
        Tap or click to build Select a tool, then tap any tile to place it.
        Move the camera One finger or left-drag to orbit · two fingers / right-drag / Space to pan · pinch or scroll to zoom.
        Keep going Use Reset, Clear, Export, Import, and Render from the top bar.
        The Farm is the default starting world. Use Reset anytime to return to it.

        AI configuration
        Used by Generate, Auto, and the floating agent. The prompt tells models to assemble requests from Tiny World primitives: terrain, paths, fences, rocks, crops, bridges, trees, tufts, and building clusters.
